alerts.headline: High Wind Watch issued March 15 at 12:58AM EDT until March 17 at 6:00AM EDT by NWS Boston/Norton MA
alerts.description:
* WHAT...South winds 20 to 30 mph with gusts up to 60 mph possible.

* WHERE...Portions of eastern, northeastern, and southeastern
Massachusetts and northern and southern Rhode Island.

* WHEN...From Monday afternoon through late Monday night.

* IMPACTS...Damaging winds could blow down trees and power lines.
Power outages are possible. Travel could be difficult, especially
for high profile vehicles.

nws_forecast.name: Today
nws_forecast.detailed: Partly sunny, with a high near 42. Northeast wind 5 to 12 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Tonight
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Mostly Cloudy then Chance Light Rain
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of rain after 4am. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 36. Southeast wind 12 to 16 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

nws_forecast.name: Monday
nws_forecast.detailed: Rain and patchy fog before 8am, then rain and patchy fog and a slight chance of thunderstorms. Cloudy, with a high near 59. Southeast wind around 17 mph, with gusts as high as 33 mph. Chance of precipitation is 100%. New rainfall amounts between a half and three quarters of an inch possible.

nws_forecast.name: Monday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: Rain and a slight chance of thunderstorms before 7pm, then rain and patchy fog and a slight chance of thunderstorms. Cloudy, with a low around 39. South wind 15 to 23 mph, with gusts as high as 60 mph. Chance of precipitation is 100%. New rainfall amounts between a half and three quarters of an inch possible.

nws_forecast.name: Tuesday
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Chance Light Rain then Mostly Sunny
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of rain before 8am. Mostly sunny, with a high near 46. West wind 14 to 17 mph, with gusts as high as 33 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%.

nws_forecast.name: Tuesday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: Mostly clear, with a low around 23. West wind 12 to 15 mph, with gusts as high as 28 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Wednesday
nws_forecast.detailed: Sunny, with a high near 38. West wind 6 to 12 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Wednesday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: Mostly cloudy, with a low around 29. South wind 6 to 9 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Thursday
nws_forecast.detailed: Mostly cloudy, with a high near 44. South wind 7 to 10 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Thursday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: Mostly cloudy, with a low around 32. South wind 6 to 9 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Friday
nws_forecast.detailed: Mostly sunny, with a high near 48. Southwest wind 6 to 9 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Friday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of rain after 7pm. Partly cloudy, with a low around 34. South wind around 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%.

nws_forecast.name: Saturday
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of rain. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 47. Southwest wind around 13 mph, with gusts as high as 23 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%.

nws_forecast.name: Saturday Night
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Chance Light Rain then Chance Light Snow
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of rain before midnight, then a chance of snow between midnight and 5am, then a slight chance of rain. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 30. West wind around 14 mph, with gusts as high as 24 mph.
